programmes.show_description: Rousing action-filled drama starring James Earl Jones. A ragtag US martial arts squad must learn the value of teamwork as they take on the masterful Koreans at the world championships. (1989)
Claustrophobic survival thriller with Ryan Reynolds. A man buried alive in the Iraqi desert tries to escape with nothing but a lighter, a mobile phone and 90 minutes of oxygen left. (2009)
Legend returns soon.
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
Chuck Norris is Walker in this modern, high-kicking martial arts western. A camping trip turns nightmarish when Alex is kidnapped by deranged brothers. S6, Ep6
Hooker and his partner investigate a series of attacks on women, in which the assailant always leaves a Bible behind. S1, Ep2
When a doctor Vincent is working with to jam alien saucer signals is killed by Invaders, Vincent is the prime suspect in the murder investigation.
Interstellar action. When a solar event throws Mercury off of its orbit, a collision with Earth seems inevitable and only a disgraced scientist's failed weapon system can save the planet. (2011)
Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month!
Spaghetti Western with Charles Bronson. In 1870, a gang of crooks robs a train and steals a ceremonial Japanese sword meant as a gift for the US President, prompting a manhunt to retrieve it. (1971)
Western directed by and starring Kirk Douglas. A US marshal tries to further his political career by capturing a railroad bandit, only to end up becoming the outlaw's hostage. (1975)
Kirk becomes embroiled in an alien race's plot to reduce the population of its planet by infecting people with a lethal plague. S3, Ep16/24
Vincent gets involved with a professor who is consumed by paranoia about the alien Invaders and is committed to a psychiatric facility. Can he help the man?
Cathy risks her life to help Hooker catch two drug dealers responsible for a teenager's death while working as a volunteer at City Hospital. S1, Ep3
Chuck Norris fights crime and helps the community as the eponymous Walker. Walker and the Rangers find themselves in the middle of an IRA conflict. S6, Ep7
Action comedy based on true events, with Tom Cruise. A pilot recruited as a CIA courier in the 1980s uses the opportunity to set up a profitable sideline trafficking drugs for a cartel. (2017)
Action thriller with Bruce Willis. A bank manager teams up with his ex-cop neighbour to hunt down a notorious group of thieves who killed his friend in a botched heist. (2018)
Tense action thriller. A retired thief is persuaded to carry out one last diamond heist by her former partner, only to get mixed up in a murder and hunted by an assassin. (2015)
Action adventure with Ben Freeman. With his true love captured by the Sheriff of Nottingham, the legendary Robin Hood and his crew of outlaws execute a daring rescue to save her. (2018)
Legend returns soon.

Chuck Norris fights crime and helps the community as the eponymous Walker. Walker and the Rangers find themselves in the middle of an IRA conflict. S6, Ep7
Cathy risks her life to help Hooker catch two drug dealers responsible for a teenager's death while working as a volunteer at City Hospital. S1, Ep3
Vincent gets involved with a professor who is consumed by paranoia about the alien Invaders and is committed to a psychiatric facility. Can he help the man?
Stormy sci-fi action. When an unexplained event causes huge storms to destroy cities across the planet, one boy and his science project must save the day. (2012)
Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month!
An astronaut stranded on a distant planet with no hope for rescue learns that a devastating nuclear war has killed his people back home. S5, Ep9
WWII drama with John Wayne. Two disgraced Navy officers must prove their worth in the aftermath of the attack on Pearl Harbour when they're placed in charge of a vital counter-offensive. (1965)
Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month!
The crew is stranded on a hostile planet and find themselves stalked by a beautiful woman who can kill people just by touching them. S3, Ep17/24
Vincent is called upon to meet a cargo vessel that has recovered debris from a suspected saucer crash. However, when he arrives, the alien fragments are missing.
Romano and Hooker pursue a van for a traffic violation and end up tackling a gang of ex-bikers involved in gun-running. S1, Ep4
Chuck Norris is Walker in this modern, high-kicking martial arts western. In another Hayes Cooper adventure, Mormons and their wagon train must be defended from outlaws. S6, Ep8
Action thriller with Gerard Butler. A submarine skipper sent to investigate the torpedoing of US and Russian vessels discovers the Russian president has been kidnapped by a rogue general. (2018)
Electrifying all-action sequel! ''Action Man' Jason Statham returns as Stelios to track down a Chinese mobster who has stolen his heart and replaced it with a battery-powered ticker. (2009)
